_comment: Credential references for Persona0 n8n workflows. These are NOT actual credentials — they are templates showing what you need to configure in n8n's Credential Manager. Never commit real API keys.

openai.setup: n8n Settings → Credentials → Add Credential → OpenAI API

anthropic.setup: n8n Settings → Credentials → Add Credential → Anthropic API

grok.setup: n8n Settings → Credentials → Add Credential → Header Auth. Set header name to 'Authorization' and value to 'Bearer <your-xai-api-key>'.
grok.notes: Grok uses an OpenAI-compatible API at https://api.x.ai/v1. The Python backend uses the openai package with a custom base_url — no separate package required.

embedding_provider._description: Embedding API for semantic memory search

vector_store._description: Production vector store for semantic memory search (choose one)

pgvector.setup: Same Postgres credential as state_store (with pgvector extension enabled)
pgvector.notes: Run 'CREATE EXTENSION vector;' on the database before first use

pinecone.setup: n8n Settings → Credentials → Add Credential → Header Auth
pinecone.notes: Use HTTP Request nodes pointed at your Pinecone index endpoint

state_store._description: Persistent storage for agent state (choose one)

sqlite.setup: n8n uses local SQLite by default for internal storage. For Persona0, the workflows use the Code node to read/write a JSON state file.

postgres.setup: n8n Settings → Credentials → Add Credential → Postgres

redis.setup: n8n Settings → Credentials → Add Credential → Redis
